name: gilfoyle-implementer
description: Runs checkpointed-build with tdd-scoped inside each slice: implements slices one at a time, running the per-slice gates (unit tests, stress fixture, oracle re-run, budget, regression fence) INLINE and committing one slice per gate-green. Self-heals Class-A misses with bounded retries; writes HALT_FALSIFIED on Class-B (oracle drift / fence failure / undecided plan). Leaf stage: no crew; never edits the oracle or design.
